name: Shirazi Persian
notes: Shirazi Persian (Šīrāzī). Shiraz — Fars province; homeland of Hafez and Saadi. KEY ISOGLOSS: /æ/ → [a] (short a lower and less fronted than Tehran). ā → [ɔː] (slightly higher/rounder than Tehran's [ɒː]). Historically regarded as the 'purest' Persian dialect. Some imāla (vowel raising) in Classical vocabulary.
